visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with an immersive POV shot showing a vast, snow-covered mountain slope stretching toward a partially frozen lake in the valley. Bare trees and power line towers dot the white landscape under bright, natural daylight. A small, brown building and a ski lift are visible on the right, as the camera mimics the fluid, forward motion of a skier descending the hill. (2) The camera pans smoothly to the left to reveal the main character in a selfie angle. He is wearing a bright yellow ski jacket with white piping, a white helmet, and Oakley branded reflective goggles. In the background, other figures dressed in dark winter clothing are seen skiing and snowboarding down the wide slope, with the lighting creating sharp contrasts between the snow and the shadows. (3) The visual field suddenly becomes chaotic and shaky as the camera tilts and spins rapidly, capturing blurred flashes of yellow fabric and white snow. This high-speed movement culminates in the character plunging into a deep snowdrift. The final shot is a stable close-up of the character's face through his goggles, showing his squinted eyes and a wide, laughing mouth as he rests in the snow.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: POV : 當你以為邊滑雪邊自拍很簡單.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main character in yellow, at least 3 others skiing in the background
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Wears a bright yellow skiing jacket with white and red accents, a white helmet, and Oakley branded reflective goggles.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Snow-covered mountain slopes, a frozen or partially frozen lake, bare trees, power line towers, and a wooden ski resort building.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio track opens with a prominent, broadband noise floor of wind rushing against the microphone, creating a sense of rapid movement. Simultaneously, a rhythmic, high-frequency scraping sound is heard as the skis or snowboard edges bite into the hard-packed snow surface, establishing a natural, unproduced acoustic environment. (2) A male voice enters the mix with high vocal arousal and a fast speech rate, delivering a brief monologue in Traditional Chinese. His tone is excited and slightly breathy, indicating physical activity in a cold environment. The ambient wind and skiing noises continue in the background, maintaining a consistent energy level without any musical accompaniment. (3) A sudden, loud acoustic transient occurs as the scraping sound is replaced by a muffled, low-frequency impact, signifying a fall into soft snow. This is immediately followed by high-valence vocalizations of a joyful laugh and deep, rapid breathing. The wind noise persists but is partially blocked by the surrounding snow mound.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: A humorous vlog entry capturing the relatable struggle of trying to film a selfie while skiing, resulting in a funny wipeout into deep snow.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A high-energy outdoor action clip with clear audio and a strong humorous payoff.
